exercises.title: Clicks and Tick-Tocks
exercises.instructions: Place tongue tip on the spot and click. Then move tongue side to side like a metronome.
exercises.compensations: Watch for jaw movement - keep jaw still

exercises.title: Brushing
exercises.instructions: Gently brush the roof of mouth with tongue in circular motions.

exercises.title: Tongue Trace
exercises.instructions: Trace the upper teeth with tongue tip from left to right.
exercises.compensations: Keep tongue tip narrow and pointed

exercises.title: BOLT Test
exercises.instructions: After normal breath, exhale and hold. Time how long until first urge to breathe.

exercises.title: Tongue Tip – One Elastic Hold
exercises.instructions: Place elastic around tongue tip and hold for 30 seconds.
exercises.compensations: Do not let tongue pull back

exercises.title: Advanced Tongue Stretches
exercises.instructions: Extend tongue as far as possible, hold for 5 seconds.
